stories.headline: Religion with CAR
stories.summary: Explores the role of computers in understanding the growing diversity of religion at the millennium. Highlights how journalists can use online resources and databases for comprehensive religion reporting.

stories.headline: CENSUS 2000: Race tabulations
stories.summary: The 2000 Census introduced significant methodological changes by allowing respondents to select multiple racial categories and splitting Asian/Pacific Islander into separate groups, creating 126 possible race/ethnicity combinations that complicate comparisons with previous census data from 1990 and earlier.
